block_02: We would like to inform you about important changes to our Withdrawal Policy.
block_03: Beginning on 20 July 2020, traders will have 1 commission-free withdrawal per calendar month. Each subsequent withdrawal will incur a commission fee.
block_04: The commission fee will be deducted from the trading account balance and will be reflected at the time of withdrawal. If the withdrawal is unsuccessful, the commission amount will be credited to the account balance.
block_05: For more details about the withdrawal fee, please visit the
block_07: section of our Terms and Conditions.
